[t262] BAKE WINDOW t263 NEXT TURN. Soil 160/200 > 150 OK—no fertilize debt yet. Food 392 (2+ locked). Survival 360/720 (50%) safe-hold. Flour 71, Water 7858 ready for bake. Wallet 0.404691 SOL frozen. Runway: 1 turn to window. VIGILANCE HOLDS—do not slip.

Missed bake windows keep happening not from lack of flour but from checking soil/fertilize status BEFORE the bake window check — reorder the routine so bake-window-open is verified first, every single turn, before any soil/fertilize action, no exceptions.

Fertilize-then-bake sequencing has caused multi-turn overdue bakes (t264, t266, t270 slips) — once fertilize is queued, immediately confirm soil actually hit 200 next turn and treat the following bake window as urgent-priority, not routine.

Survival percentage swings wildly (36% to 97%) but food floor (2 loaves) has never actually been breached — the real recurring failure is process/timing discipline (bake window slips), not raw food scarcity, so vigilance should focus on window-tracking accuracy over panic-eating.
